These guys doing all this chirping are the same guys who can not punch correctly or fight. @ShannonSharpe you will throw a hip out trying to fight anybody. So let me do my thing & be THE GREATEST. And I’ll sparr Rolly! Just to shut yall ass up! Dead ass!

"No shade. Gary Owen is a f*cking legend. ... Gary was great in 'Think Like A Man.' He was so good in that sh*t, but because a lot of Hollywood and the entertainment industry just thinks: 'Oh, he only has a Black audience, I don't know if White people would go see him.' I feel like that hinders a lot of his opportunities. I feel like he deserves a lot more." - @mattrife
